findings.description: s4 merges four distinct source h3-level sections (自動設定項目の指定, ビジネスロジック(Component)の作成, Actionの作成, JSPの作成) into a single section. The combined content is well over 2000 characters and the source clearly separates these as distinct subsections under 作成手順.
findings.source_evidence: Source has four separate === headings: '自動設定項目の指定(Entityの編集)', 'ビジネスロジック(Component)の作成', 'Actionの作成', 'JSPの作成'. Each covers distinct implementation concerns.

findings.description: s4 hints are missing `MessageUtil` and `MessageLevel`, both of which appear in the Java code example within s4's content (in the DuplicateStatementException catch block).
findings.source_evidence: Source code in ビジネスロジック section: `throw new ApplicationException(MessageUtil.createMessage(MessageLevel.ERROR, "MSG00001"));` — both classes appear in the code example included in s4.
